REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE, OFF CALENDAR, 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON 3/12/15. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT DANIEL VIELE'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (PARAGRAPHS 32 AND 47) TO ALLEGE FACTS SUPPORTING PUNITIVE DAMAGES REQUEST. MOTION IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PARAGRAPHS 55-57, PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE NOT AVAILABLE IN BREACH CONTRACT CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE A LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE A CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION CAUSE OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Set For Trial On Mar-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2015 Continued To Aug-26-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DANIEL VIELE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend (paragraphs 32 and 47) to allege facts supporting punitive damages request. Motion is granted without leave to amend as to paragraphs 55-57, punitive damages are not available in breach contract causes of action. Plaintiff shall have a leave to amend to allege a constructive eviction cause of action. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Continued To Jun-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2015 Continued To May-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT DANIEL VIELE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to May 14, 2015. Moving party failed to provide the Court with a courtesy copy of the operative complaint. (See SF Local Rule 2.6C.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on May 4, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Off Calendar
